'''Mark Schultz''' worked as an artist and a writer for several comic books.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Contributions==
'''Cover artist:'''
*[[Star Wars (1998) 13|''Star Wars'' (1998) 13]]
*[[Star Wars (1998) 14|''Star Wars'' (1998) 14]]
*[[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]]
*[[Star Wars (1998) 16|''Star Wars'' (1998) 16]]
*[[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]]
*[[Classic Star Wars 17|''Classic Star Wars'' 17]]
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Scoundrel's Wages]]''

'''Writer:'''

*{{Tales|6|Fortune, Fate, and the Natural History of the Sarlacc}}
